message:
fix: address staticcheck findings and code quality issues

Bug fixes:
- Fix potential nil pointer dereference in TestNewBox and TestNewList
  by using t.Fatal instead of t.Error for nil checks

Dead code removal:
- Remove unused hostname() func in robot/helpers.go
- Remove unused outputSchemaJSON() func in robot/schema.go
- Remove unused mu field in serve/server.go
- Remove unused selectedItems field in tutorial/model.go
- Remove unused spawnParticles() method in tutorial/model.go
- Remove unused makeTestStep() helper in pipeline/parallel_test.go

Style improvements:
- Use raw strings for regexp.MustCompile in auth/restart.go
- Lowercase error strings per Go convention (agent mail -> agent mail)
- Use append shorthand instead of loop in robot/tui_parity.go
- Remove unnecessary fmt.Sprintf for string literals in cli/save.go
- Remove dead code in components_test.go (unused HasPrefix check)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,13 +136,13 @@ func runSave(w io.Writer, session, outputDir string, lines int, filter AgentFilt
 		outputPath := filepath.Join(outputDir, filename)
 
 		// Add header to file
-		header := fmt.Sprintf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
+		header := "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
 		header += fmt.Sprintf("Session: %s\n", session)
 		header += fmt.Sprintf("Pane: %s (index %d)\n", p.Title, p.Index)
 		header += fmt.Sprintf("Command: %s\n", p.Command)
 		header += fmt.Sprintf("Captured: %s\n", time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339))
 		header += fmt.Sprintf("Lines: %d\n", lines)
-		header += fmt.Sprintf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
+		header += "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n"
 
 		content := header + output
